title: Low Carb BBQ Meatballs
ingredients: 1 tsp McCormick Grill Mates Smokehouse Maple
instructions:
Spray a foil baking sheet with butter cooking spray.
In a large mixing bowl combine the ground beef with the next 9 ingredients until well mixed.
Roll into 12 meatballs about 2” each. Bake for 15 minutes or until cooked.
In a small bowl whisk the ketchup and salad dressing together and brush the meatballs with the mixture. Use all of it. Sprinkle the meatballs with the Grill Mates for added flavor.
Return the meatballs to the oven and turn on the broiler. Broil for 1-2 minutes or until the sauce begins to caramelize.
Serve hot with your favorite low carb sides.
Calories 94 Carb 1g
